title: Stenotus interior
taxonomy: Stenotus interior is classified within the flowering plant family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Stenotus, which includes several species of plants. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Stenotus interior is native to western North America, specifically in the mountainous regions of the western United States. Within the Asteraceae family, Stenotus interior is further classified as a member of the tribe Astereae.
